recentTweets.text:
Public education is the great equalizer and we love our schools in Central New York and the Mohawk Valley.

I will vigorously oppose any efforts to dismantle the Department of Education because it will hurt students and teachers.

This administration should be prioritizing https://t.co/PN4k9ewEDQ

I'll always work hard to deliver for our region.

To keep up with what I'm doing in D.C. and across Central New York and the Mohawk Valley, sign up for my newsletter. ⬇️
https://t.co/5pntPlXER7
RT @SpecOlympicsNY: @SenGillibrand @SpecialOlympics @BucknellU @SenSchumer @721M_CityHawks @sowg_ Team NY had a great #SOHillDay visit with…

The president's executive orders and other actions strike at the heart of our democracy, our values, and over 200 years of American tradition.

I know many of you are deeply concerned – and so am I.

We're in this fight together. https://t.co/MkG5uXDua3

February is Black History Month, a time to recognize the extraordinary achievements of Black Americans in every part of life and culture in Central New York, the Mohawk Valley, and across the nation. https://t.co/HSoyDxfe6P

Canada is one of our biggest trading partners. An across the board tariff w  our neighbor to the north is inflationary, will raise costs & cause pain for American businesses & working families across #NY22 
This is bad policy & not what the people of this country need or want
Just like when this administration tried to freeze funding for essential programs earlier this week, I will push back against any attempts to meddle with Americans hard earned benefits.

I am extremely concerned that the private and confidential Medicare and Social Security information of residents across CNY and the Mohawk Valley has now been shared with corporate billionaires and their private businesses.
According to reports, Elon Musk and his billionaire buddies have received access to confidential U.S. treasury payment systems.
RT @HouseAgDems: "No one wins in a trade war. The last time President Trump started a trade war, costs went up for America’s family farmers…

I've worked with Stephen Butler and my friends at CNY Arts to secure $10M for the arts, museum funding, and continuing the Scholastic Art Scholarship program. 
Thank you for your advocacy for the arts and our cultural institutions - and best wishes in your retirement! https://t.co/VVSsKTMIzi

I passed laws to protect doctors and patients from these kinds of extreme attacks on longstanding reproductive freedoms.

Reproductive health care is not a crime. I’ll always fight back when politicians try to stand between NY providers and their patients. https://t.co/BI9HWz0ERp

My thoughts are with the families impacted by the tragic loss of life from the collision near DCA last night. 

I’m grateful for the efforts of the first responders and I will be following the NTSB’s investigation closely to make sure our skies remain the safest in the world.

NY-22 would be negatively impacted by a federal funding freeze. That’s why I moved so quickly to echo your concerns and urge the administration to revoke its dangerous guidance.

I’m glad they listened to us.

I won’t rest until every dollar intended for NY-22 is delivered. https://t.co/A9HOdKc8n9

The freeze in federal funding is causing chaos and confusion

Public safety, health care, rural development, schools, childcare, and other essential services rely on these dollars.

Read my letter urging OMB to revoke this unlawful guidance:

https://t.co/jolTfhQw18

In a world that needs positive role models, I’m proud to say that Dave Kaminski was my coach, role model & friend. Coach Cheese coached me at West End PBA Little League almost 50 years ago and has had a positive impact on the lives of so many young people. RIP @StJoesCYO https://t.co/nvHNiDIaQp

The time is always right, to do what is right.”
-Dr. Martin Luther King Jr @SyracuseU 1965
These words are as true today & as important as they were when they were spoken here years ago 
Congrats to those honored & kudos to those who inspired us at the 40th Annual MLK Celebration https://t.co/sOWHkqz73l

I'm excited to advocate for NY-22's rural communities & farmers on the Ag Committee

I'll also be serving on 2 subcommittees that will help me be a powerful voice for our region:  Commodity Markets, Digital Assets, & Rural Development;  & Conservation, Research, and Biotech https://t.co/exyOumkLWi

Round table today discussing the negative impact of the Citizens United Supreme Court decision that occurred 15 yrs ago. The inauguration & the executive orders that followed are a stark reminder of the impact that dark money, corporations & wealthy donors have on our government. https://t.co/R3khGZJU87

I’m reminded of the powerful words MLK Jr shared w us @SyracuseU in ‘61: “We must learn to live together as brothers, or we will perish together as fools.” More than ever, we must honor his teachings working together to face our country’s challenges.
https://t.co/U8RxO1K7Fk https://t.co/SeqGyIgxZI

Hey, it’s good to be back home again!
@Woodfiredbagels https://t.co/isxjjEDml8

In one building, I met with leaders @DrWeeksSCSD community school on providing stability for our most vulnerable students. Then NE Comm Center where families access a multitude of services here including a diaper bank, job training and language acquisition. Huge job fair today! https://t.co/j2kAIPdGHT

America's bond with Israel is unshakable, and our commitment to its safety and security remains absolute. At the same time, we must also stand with Palestinians who seek peace, dignity, and the right to determine their own future.

My statement on the Gaza ceasefire deal: https://t.co/E1keNOrLT1

RT @EdWorkforceDems: We are excited to announce the newest additions to our committee. 

Welcome aboard! https://t.co/lHtvX1lfcr

The Ed & Workforce Committee is ready to build an America where everyone can succeed.  

I’ll be serving on two subcommittees that align with my labor & teaching experience - Early Childhood, Elementary and Secondary Education, and Health, Employment, Labor, & Pensions. https://t.co/7vXvOgou8w

As the only US-based memory manufacturer, Micron’s $100B  investment in NY-22 will be key to ensuring U.S. tech leadership.

It was great to see @MicronTech on the Hill today - I’ll continue to champion homegrown innovation and the local jobs that come with it. https://t.co/x8BZCLiT1s

I look forward to championing policies that invest in education, strengthen our workforce, support New York’s farmers and provide our rural communities with better access to healthcare and broadband. https://t.co/ClGpN0eXhl

NEWS:  $3.9 million in federal support will help establish nearly sixty miles of bicycle infrastructure across five counties in CNY. The funding will help create the “CNY Peace Trail” - a significant quality of life improvement

https://t.co/Tpj427XivW
Congressman Mannion Meets with Micron Global Operations Executive Vice President for Project Update  https://t.co/wXGzT6wcRn
Rest in peace, President Carter. https://t.co/AatYJL3YWq

Upstate Hospital needs investments to serve the health care needs of our community.

I’ll continue to be an advocate for a new Emergency Department and other necessary upgrades.

https://t.co/pmvUNAO3H5

A productive meeting w/ Manish Bhatia, Executive VP of Global Operations for Micron, on the $100B investment to manufacture semiconductors in NY-22.

I'm committed to protecting Chips and Science and ensuring the Clay project succeeds - for our people and our national security. https://t.co/XX0YXsXmBr

In the Capitol Rotunda to pay my respects to President Carter. 

He will lie in state until Thursday morning, followed by a state funeral at the National Cathedral. https://t.co/rwfCDuxcFk

I'm hosting a ticket lottery for NY-22 constituents who want to attend the presidential inauguration

There is a limit of 2 tickets per household and you must be a resident of NY-22

The deadline to submit a ticket request is noon on Friday January 10th 

https://t.co/d8yJ8dPLxy

RT @Saab_Inc: Thank you Congressman @JohnMannionNY22 for stopping by our U.S. headquarters in Syracuse, New York!

We value your partnershi…

Flight was canceled so I drove from Syracuse to DC. 

On the way, I talked about some of my priorities in Congress like protecting Chips and Science, workers’ rights, lower taxes, and immigration reform. https://t.co/3d7lUcT5Mm

Pardoning January 6th rioters is wrong. Political violence, fake elector schemes, intimidation, and threats to the Vice President mark a dark chapter in our history. 

My full statement as a joint session of Congress convenes to certify the 2024 election: https://t.co/yW2kCgMZ2o
A tour of the White House with the people I love. https://t.co/GVe6GHlfT6
My statement on the passing of President James Earl Carter. A great family man, humanitarian, statesman and public servant. https://t.co/s086Acgf68

Often a first step towards treatment and recovery is surviving an accidental overdose. My legislation will give more people the opportunity to recover & rebuild their lives. Placing opioid antagonists in public buildings is a needed step forward in combatting the opioid crisis. https://t.co/R6UGagrFEt
Statement From Senator Mannion on the Passing of Former State Senator Tarky Lombardi: https://t.co/qn7j0oIOS5

The new Schepps Corners Road bridge over the Thruway will reduce dangerous and costly bridge strikes and keep Onondaga County communities safely connected - and it was completed on-time and on-budget.  https://t.co/8u374x5NA0

Thank you to the men and women who have served in our nation's armed forces.

Every Veteran has contributed to the safety, freedom, and ideals we all hold dear.

Your service and courage is inspiring, and will always be remembered and appreciated. https://t.co/MXeKJcBiGU

I support funding for GENIUS NY because it attracts companies to our region and creates jobs. I congratulate and thank all the winners and participants and look forward to their continued contributions to Central New York. https://t.co/40XheF7ZkU
https://t.co/f1PennHmF5

A beautiful fall morning in the Village of Camillus to cut the ribbon on improvements to Munro Park that I was able to fund with a $230K state grant.

We've replaced equipment that was nearly 40 years old with an ADA compliant playground and built a new picnic pavilion. https://t.co/L9vm3GBf4H

G’mar Chatimah Tovah!

Wishing the Jewish community that's observing Yom Kippur an easy and meaningful fast. https://t.co/ys6G2yWyr0
My statement on the one-year anniversary of the October 7th Hamas terror attack on the Jewish people: https://t.co/W8r74yjYfg

TTM Technologies’ $130M investment shows that our strategy to grow advanced manufacturing is working. 
This facility will bring 100's of jobs to our region and strengthen America's defense capabilities

I'll continue to work to deliver jobs and quality of life to our communities https://t.co/j2UvvGMM0U

Shana Tova!

Wishing our neighbors that are celebrating Rosh Hashanah a happy and blessed New Year! https://t.co/CASuTVjNRg

The Auxiliary makes the firehouse a place that feels like home while giving back to their communities and contributing to public safety.

Congratulations to the Liverpool Fire Department Auxiliary on one hundred years of dedicated service! https://t.co/5ORcjUp6iH

My deepest condolences to everyone in the Oswego County Sheriff’s Office and to the family and friends of the Deputy killed in a traffic accident today. 

Police work is never routine. 

Thank you for everything you do to keep our communities safe.
RT @CnyLyme: @SenJohnMannion with us at the #lymesummit24 https://t.co/tPgyT1Vnn9

Bluefors is expanding its Syracuse manufacturing and R and D as part of CNY's high-tech ecosystem.

The region is well-positioned to compete with anyone in the world in the science of advanced cooling and cutting-edge quantum technologies. https://t.co/PEOzf5zPsO

SENIOR FAIR HAPPENING TUESDAY IN OSWEGO!

My annual Oswego County Senior Fair will be held on Tuesday September 17th from 2pm to 5pm at the Lake Ontario Event Center.

I hope you'll join me to learn all about the great programs and services available to our senior community! https://t.co/02nIdlOFpR

Over 4 legislative sessions I've delivered COLA's and helped fortify a workforce that suffered from years of inadequate funding

We have elevated these issues to the forefront of the policy conversation in Albany

This is DSP Appreciation Week - THANK YOU to all DSPs! https://t.co/DuFjwYZcna

I will never forget the heroes and victims of 9/11.

I'm inspired by the nation's resilience when facing its greatest challenges. I'm so grateful for members of the Armed Forces, police officers, firefighters, and first responders who protect us, and defend our way of life. https://t.co/QYjMoq6ciE
